# Third-Party Code

This directory contains small vendored dependencies used by the MCP integration.

## cpp-httplib

- Path: `cpp-httplib/`
- Upstream: https://github.com/yhirose/cpp-httplib
- Version: `0.43.3`
- License: MIT, see `cpp-httplib/LICENSE`
- Use: local HTTP/1.1 server for the embedded MCP transport skeleton.
